characters.name: Pig
characters.description: Nigh-Invulnerability: This dude got impaled and pulled out the spear like it was nothing and that ain't getting into how he ate pickles full of spears. Sure, pigs, in real life, can be pretty durable and they can eat just about anything but this guy is built different. Only Known by Their Nickname: Supposedly, according to one ep, "Pig" is short for "Pignatius Abalonea Plutonius" Trademark Favorite Food: This dude is obsessed with pickles, need we say more? Vitriolic Best Buds: He has a one-sided friendship with Angry Old Raisin. He wants to be closer to him, but Angry Old Raisin hates his guts.

characters.name: Goat
characters.description: Angrish: She starts babbling when she gets mad enough. Women Are Wiser: Well, she's either the smartest or the second smartest of the group, regardless, she's this. That said, she's quick to anger. Younger Than They Look: OrVague Age. Prolly. Apparently, she's been Pig's roommate for, quote, "29 years" and she and Pig looks like they could be kids.

characters.name: Banana
characters.description: Lazy Bum: A lot of what he does is sit around and play video games. Why Did It Have to Be Snakes?: He, obviously, is afraid of primates.

characters.name: Cricket
characters.description: Only Sane Man: Compared to the other three, he's this, as he tends to clean up their messes.

characters.name: Burgerstein
characters.description: The Unintellegible: He only communicates in grunts and groans for the most part.
